productDisplayName: United Colors of Benetton Men Washed Blue Jeans
description: CompositionBlue mid stone washed jeans made of 100% cotton, has pockets on the sides, two pockets on the back with thread detailing, comfortable waist with loops and a cross loop at the mid back, brand badge on the waist, and has a zippered and button closureFittingLow waist; Slim FitWash careDelicate machine wash coldDo not bleach, scrub, wring or tumble dryHang dry in shadeWarm ironYour failsafe slim fit day to night denim style is finally here! united colors of benetton creates this slim fit dark blue-hued jeans with cotton fabric to offer exemplary comfort and a flattering fit, while the stone washed effect adds to your hip attitude. Look fabulous by pairing this with t-shirts and suede shoes.Model statisticsThe model wears jeans of length 41.5"Height: 6'1'; Waist: 31"
